JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIN CRANE/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:MAURA ESPINOSA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL DAVID MENDEZ. DEFT JULIUS BRIGGS PRESENT & APPEARED IN PRO PIA PERSONA. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIGGS, JULIUS SUED AS BRRIGS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 6TH STREET, #25, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,431.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,431.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-06-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
